channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Les fondements de la croissance et de la compétitivité 2026
item.description: Les fondements de la croissance et de la compétitivité 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 9 April 2026 at 9:30.
item.oe:directorate: Economics Department

item.title: Foundations for Growth and Competitiveness 2026
item.description: Foundations for Growth and Competitiveness 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 9 April 2026 at 9:30.
item.oe:directorate: Economics Department

item.title: Empowering SMEs in the age of AI - The 2026 OECD D4SME Survey
item.description: Empowering SMEs in the age of AI - The 2026 OECD D4SME Survey by Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities has an embargo on Monday 13 April 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities

item.title: Chemical content validation of recycled plastics
item.description: Chemical content validation of recycled plastics by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Monday 13 April 2026 at 8:30.
item.oe:directorate: Environment Directorate

item.title: Participation of third-country bidders in the EU procurement market
item.description: Participation of third-country bidders in the EU procurement market by Directorate for Public Governance has an embargo on Wednesday 15 April 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Public Governance

item.title: OECD Secretary-General Tax Report to G20 Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors (G20 United States, April 2026)
item.description: OECD Secretary-General Tax Report to G20 Finance Ministers and Central Bank Governors (G20 United States, April 2026) by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 16 April 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Rapport sur la fiscalité du Secrétaire général de l’OCDE à l’intention des ministres des Finances et des gouverneurs de banque centrale du G20 (G20 États-unis, avril 2026)
item.description: Rapport sur la fiscalité du Secrétaire général de l’OCDE à l’intention des ministres des Finances et des gouverneurs de banque centrale du G20 (G20 États-unis, avril 2026) by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 16 April 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Benchmarking SME decarbonisation policies
item.description: Benchmarking SME decarbonisation policies by Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities has an embargo on Friday 17 April 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities

item.title: Harnessing the private sector’s contribution to climate adaptation
item.description: Harnessing the private sector’s contribution to climate adaptation by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Monday 20 April 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Environment Directorate

item.title: Taxing Wages 2026 - The Progressivity of Labour Taxation in OECD Countries
item.description: Taxing Wages 2026 - The Progressivity of Labour Taxation in OECD Countries by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Wednesday 22 April 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Les impôts sur les salaires 2026 (version abrégée) - La progressivité de l’imposition des revenus du travail dans les pays de l’OCDE
item.description: Les impôts sur les salaires 2026 (version abrégée) - La progressivité de l’imposition des revenus du travail dans les pays de l’OCDE by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Wednesday 22 April 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Results from the Teacher Knowledge Survey - What Teachers Know About General Pedagogy
item.description: Results from the Teacher Knowledge Survey - What Teachers Know About General Pedagogy by Directorate for Education and Skills has an embargo on Wednesday 22 April 2026 at 16:30.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Education and Skills

item.title: OECD Economic Surveys: Italy 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Italy 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 23 April 2026 at 0:00.
item.oe:directorate: Economics Department

item.title: Artificial Intelligence in Italian Financial Markets
item.description: Artificial Intelligence in Italian Financial Markets by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Friday 24 April 2026 at 10:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Mobilising Financing and Investment for Quality Infrastructure in Egypt
item.description: Mobilising Financing and Investment for Quality Infrastructure in Egypt by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Monday 4 May 2026 at 0:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: OECD Reviews of Innovation Policy: Egypt 2026
item.description: OECD Reviews of Innovation Policy: Egypt 2026 by Directorate for Science, Technology and Industry has an embargo on Monday 4 May 2026 at 7:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Science, Technology and Industry

item.title: Building Strong Foundations for Life - Results from the 2025 Early Learning and Child Well-being Study
item.description: Building Strong Foundations for Life - Results from the 2025 Early Learning and Child Well-being Study by Directorate for Education and Skills has an embargo on Tuesday 5 May 2026 at 10:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Education and Skills

item.title: Revenue Statistics in Latin America and the Caribbean 2026
item.description: Revenue Statistics in Latin America and the Caribbean 2026 by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Tuesday 5 May 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Tax Policy and Administration

item.title: Financement de la protection sociale au Cameroun - Le rôle de la fiscalité générale, des cotisations sociales et de la contribution du secteur informel
item.description: Financement de la protection sociale au Cameroun - Le rôle de la fiscalité générale, des cotisations sociales et de la contribution du secteur informel by Centre for Tax Policy and Administration has an embargo on Thursday 7 May 2026 at 11:00.

item.title: OECD Economic Surveys: Japan 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Japan 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Wednesday 13 May 2026 at 10:00.
item.oe:directorate: Economics Department

item.title: Competition Market Study of Online Marketplaces in Poland, Latvia and Lithuania
item.description: Competition Market Study of Online Marketplaces in Poland, Latvia and Lithuania by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Monday 18 May 2026 at 14:30.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: OECD Environmental Performance Reviews: Austria 2026
item.description: OECD Environmental Performance Reviews: Austria 2026 by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Friday 22 May 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Environment Directorate
